title: Germany blames Russia for 'bitter defeat' in UN Security Council bid
summary_full: Johann Wadephul said it was "no secret" Russia had stirred up sentiment against Germany over its support for Ukraine.
summary_public: Johann Wadephul said it was "no secret" Russia had stirred up sentiment against Germany over its support for Ukraine.
